title: selaginella sanguinolenta
intro: Selaginella sanguinolenta, also known as red rose or bloodwort, is a species of evergreen plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its reddish stems and leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella sanguinolenta are attributed to its ability to reduce blood pressure, lower cholesterol levels, and act as an anti-oxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Selaginella sanguinolenta is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in herbal supplements, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
